programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children practise yoga. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies are very busy. Tinky Winky is marching with his bag, Dipsy is dancing with his hat, Laa-Laa is playing with her ball and Po is riding her scooter.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies giggle as they play their 'Through the Arch' game. The windmill stops them to watch a little girl and her dad go for a walk in the town.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa run into Home Hill to say 'Eh-oh', but where 's Po? Some children help their dad to wash his car. They get very wet and soapy.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a group of children play hide and seek. The Teletubbies play their own hiding game. Tinky Winky can’t see Dipsy when he hides, and Laa-Laa can’t see Tinky Winky and Dipsy when they hide.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance before watching some children wrapping presents for their friend. The Noo Noo tidies up the Teletubbies blankets, while the Tubbies are still in bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children have fun riding their trikes. Po is riding her scooter and the other Teletubbies want to have a go.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A black and a white cloud appear in Teletubbyland. The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the colour black.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little girl who loves monkeys help her mum feed them in a zoo. Tinky Winky sits down to eat some Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A fierce storm is forecast for Bobsville. At the farm Travis stays safe and snug in his shed, while Spud takes cover in a large barn. The storm causes a lot of damage and a tree falls on Spud’s barn – he’s okay, but his nose is a bit squashed!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have been asked to replace some burst pipes under the main road. Meanwhile Jenny is in town to persuade Wendy to take a much-needed holiday. Unfortunately, there’s lots of work to do and Wendy simply doesn’t have time to go away.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has a new family of Pigs being delivered to his farm and Bob must build a new home for them. In the meantime, Farmer Pickles places the pigs in an old Barn to keep them safe.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are all ready to set up Mr Sabatini’s bakery opposite the windmill so it’s close to the flour. Bob promises a surprise when they get there, and who should roll out from behind a bush but Benny!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today Bob and the team have a very exciting job to do. They are building a bridge over the river to where Mr Sabatini’s new bakery will be. Bob promises Scrambler that he can be the first machine across the bridge.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Did you just say something?"
programme.desc: In the very first episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to North Yorkshire. Amongst other things, they investigate a ghostly photograph taken by a member of the public. What will the team uncover during their overnight paranormal investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "That's so freaky!"
programme.desc: In this episode of Are You Haunted..? the team travels to Stockport to investigate stories of shadow figures, phantom voices, mysterious figures, and more. Will they encounter anything paranormal?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "It came from near the door!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team travel to South Yorkshire to investigate a haunted building that dates to the late 18th century. With reports of a mysterious figure being seen, footsteps being heard, and possible poltergeist activity, how will they get on?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "The heebie-jeebies!"
programme.desc: The 'Are You Haunted' team head northwest in this episode, and to a venue that counts reports of a mysterious black shape, and phantom screams as just two of the many incidents reported there. What will the team encounter?

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mick Hughes
programme.desc: Landlord and pub owner Mick Hughes is brutally attacked in his living quarters situated above his bar, he bleeds to death. Discovered by employees 48 hours later, the police start gathering evidence.

programme.title: Sensing Murder
programme.desc: 19-year-old Joan Wech left New Zealand for the bright lights of Sydney. But the first step on her overseas adventure would be her last. Was this a robbery gone wrong, a savage random attack or a revenge killing by a jealous ex-lover?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Long Way Home
programme.desc: 25-year-old Te Puke woman Judy Yorke was a devoted single mum who adored her kids. When she missed her daughter’s fourth birthday party, her family knew something was terribly wrong and reported her missing.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Last Orders
programme.desc: In 1993, devoted father Kevin O'Loughlin came face to face with the dark side of sunny Nelson when he was brutally stabbed to death after a night out on the town.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Episode 8
programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.desc: The PRS travels to Sin City to investigate a 14-year old medium who claims to speak to a dead girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Invitation to Evil
programme.desc: Paula and her husband Mike are under siege by a purported shadow demon in their North Carolina home. Paula has witnessed a toddler bed levitating and heard deep growls. Michelle, Ryan and the team uncover the shocking truth behind the haunting.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghost On the Tracks
programme.desc: PRS is called to a New Jersey beauty salon, but they soon learn that the building's proximity to deadly train tracks might be the true cause of spirit activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Ghosts of the Forgotten
programme.desc: The PRS investigation into the haunted Lake County Poor House becomes a journey through one PRS team members? troubled past.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Intervention
programme.desc: Carol Ann stays awake every night taping the voices of the dead. PRS cuts their winter break short to help her curtail her obsession and close this doorway to the dead--for good.

programme.title: Paranormal State: I Am Six
programme.desc: Laura has felt oppressed by a violent spirit ever since she heard a chilling EVP in the fall of 2007. The 26-year-old claims she's been beaten, choked, even forcibly submerged.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: When Paula's young autistic son Michael, with limited verbal skills uttered the words "Go away scary dead boy" -- it sent a chill up her spine.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Eden Camp Museum
programme.desc: Once a prison camp during WWII, Eden Camp is now a museum housing many an artefact and many a ghost. Karl enters the cottage to face the spirits that are said to haunt this once family home.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hickleton Hall
programme.desc: Once a grand mansion, this huge property is now very much passed it previous grandeur. Stuart investigates the long empty corridors alone and something seems to be following him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Hack Green Nuclear Bunker
programme.desc: Karl and Stuart head to Hack Green Bunker and witness, first hand, the paranormal activity that regularly occurs there.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Charlton House
programme.desc: Karl investigates Carlton house library for the first time and quickly realises that he is not alone.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P1
programme.desc: Karl enters Borwick Hall for the first time as he investigates the upper floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Borwick Hall P2
programme.desc: Our investigation into Borwick Hall continues as Stuart investigates the middle floors.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the outbuildings of this large estate, where many people have witnessed strange occurrences, some he is about to witness first-hand.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Nutty Hill is suffering from a stifling heat wave. Searching in vain for a bit of cool air, Grizzy suddenly has a brilliant idea.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's nap is interrupted by an annoying vibration, the forest ranger's cell phone. It has various functions, including a game to which he instantly becomes addicted.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: Freed by the thawing ice, a mysterious giant egg slides up to the front door of the log cabin and the Lemmings watch with interest as it hatches.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: By chance, Grizzy discovers that the ranger's new robot vacuum cleaner also gives very pleasant back massages.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku starts having trouble controlling his body and energy, so after visiting with King Kai, he gets put on bed rest until his energy levels out. Also, when he goes to stay at Gohan's, he has trouble taking it easy with baby Pan around.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With Majin Buu defeated, Goku has taken a completely new unexpected role as a farmer. Now, with Earth at peace, our heroes have finally settled into normal lives, for the moment.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Vegeta tries to fight the duplicate Vegeta created out of the Superhuman Water, but discovers his copy possesses all of his energy. Potage reveals that Vegeta will disappear unless someone can defeat his duplicate quickly, forcing Gotenks to step up.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku fights Vegeta's copy while the true Vegeta becomes more transparent by the minute; Trunks, Goten, Potage and Jaco scramble to destroy Commeson's core to help Goku gain an advantage.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: After mistakenly attacking Goku, Trunks reintroduces himself and explains the threat to his timeline; Goku and Trunks spar to get a sense of each other's power levels.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and Goku Black fight each other, but the time portal begins to collapse, dragging Goku Black into it. Also, with Trunks' capsule destroyed, the group must find a new means of time travel.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku heads off to train while Bulma fixes up Cell's old time-travelling capsule. Also, Trunks explains what happened in his future and the emergence of Goku Black.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: The gang continues making repairs; at Piccolo and Krillin's suggestion, Future Trunks goes to visit Gohan, who mentored him in his timeline.

programme.title: Awake
programme.desc: While undergoing surgery, a wealthy young man experiences intraoperative awareness and discovers that the surgical team intended to murder him.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Snitch (2013)
programme.desc: A father (Dwayne Johnson) goes undercover for the DEA in order to free his son who was imprisoned after being set up in a drug deal.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: A modern family tries to survive a weekend wedding celebration that has the potential to become a full-blown fiasco in this uproarious romantic comedy with an all-star cast.

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Malcolm Turner and his stepson Trent go undercover at an all-girls performing arts school

programme.title: Cinderella Pact
programme.desc: Nola, Deb, and Nancy are best friends who create a Cinderella Pact—a weight loss agreement using advice from "fairy godmother" newspaper columnist Bel.

programme.title: The Devil's Plaything
programme.desc: A lesbian vampire's soul is kept on in the bodies of her descendants.

programme.title: A Star is Born
programme.desc: A young woman comes to Hollywood with dreams of stardom, but achieves them only with the help of a man whose best days are behind him.

programme.title: Spaced Out
programme.desc: When three voluptuous female aliens crash-land in an English park, the result is close encounters of the sauciest kind! Three hapless men witness the UFO's arrival and are kidnapped by the sexy extra-terrestrials who discover the joys of first contact!

programme.title: The Great Adventure
programme.desc: Set during the American Gold Rush era, this is an unforgettable tale of an orphaned boy and his wild dog who must battle against the Yukon wilderness and human greed to help save a frontier town. Starring: Jack Palance, Joan Collins, Elisabetta Virgili

programme.title: Cry Blood, Apache
programme.desc: Outlaws massacre an Apache village for gold; a survivor leads them into the desert, unaware a vengeful warrior is on their trail.

programme.title: Once Upon a Texas Train: Once Upon a Texas Train
programme.desc: An outlaw and a Texas Ranger Captain have a life-long personal feud, but twenty years later, with old-age settling in, they must put their differences aside in order to face the latest Texas problem, the youngest generation of outlaws.

programme.title: Redirected
programme.desc: Starring Hollywood hard man Vinnie Jones, "Redirected" follows four friends turned first-time robbers who accidentally get stranded in a middle-of-nowhere Eastern European country.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: The Expatriate
programme.desc: An ex-CIA agent and his estranged daughter are forced on the run when his employers erase all records of his existence, and mark them both for termination as part of a wide-reaching international conspiracy.

programme.title: People I Know
programme.desc: A press agent (Al Pacino) is lead into the murky world of political conspiracy and murder when his major client becomes embroiled in a huge scandal.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: 10 Minutes Gone
programme.desc: Action legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Michael Chiklis ("The Shield") light up this edge-of-your seat thriller.

programme.title: The Call Up
programme.desc: When a group of gamers receive a mysterious invitation to trial a virtual-reality game, it's impossible to resist. To begin, it's a dream come true but when the group is attacked by real enemy combatants, they soon realise that this is no game after all.

programme.title: Last Man
programme.desc: Kurt, combat veteran with PTSD and hallucinations, fortifies his home and builds a secret underground shelter due to doomsday like weather changes. He gets a security job to pay for it and his boss' cute daughter for company.

programme.title: Infinitum: Subject Unknown
programme.desc: A mind-bending slice of British science fiction, featuring Sir Ian McKellan and Conleth Hill.

programme.title: Slow Moe
programme.desc: When struggling baseball player Marvin finds a pair of glasses that transform him into a star player, he thinks he can't win without the glasses. But when they disappear, Marvin's teammates help him realize winning doesn't mean anything.

programme.title: Storm Boy
programme.desc: When Michael Kingley, a successful retired businessman starts to see images from his past that he can't explain, he's forced to remember his childhood and how, as a boy, he rescued and raised an extraordinary orphaned pelican, Mr Percival.

programme.title: The Adventurer: Curse of the Midas Box
programme.desc: Transporting you to a rambunctious realm of enchanting fantasy. When Mariah's little brother is kidnapped, he follows a trail of clues to discover a hidden realm of monsters, ancient secrets and a long-lost artefact. Feat: Michael Sheen & Sam Neill.

programme.title: Closer to God
programme.desc: A genetic scientist successfully clones the first human being, a baby girl named Elizabeth.

programme.title: Another world
programme.desc: Four survivors who defend themselves against the "infected" discover another survivor.

programme.title: Ravage
programme.desc: Harper, a young nature photographer on assignment captures a disturbing event of a man being brutally beaten in the woods.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1938, Nazi Germany annexed Austria. Hitler seized the Spear of Destiny, a Roman spearhead believed to hold power from Christ's crucifixion. He paraded it in Nuremberg to assert authority, but by 1945, amid Germany's ruin, the spear had vanished.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Richard Knight, an actor and laborer, became obsessed with Captain Kidd's treasure. He found clues in old maps and located a potential site in Communist Vietnam's Hon Tre Lon. Despite risks, he and Fred Graham journeyed there, only to be captured.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: King Solomon ruled Israel 3,000 years ago, famed for a visit from the Queen of Sheba. The quest for Solomon's gold spans millennia. Karl Mauch believed he found Ophir in southern Africa. Yet, the search for Solomon's true mines persists.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1941, Germany looted the Amber Room, an extraordinary art installation from the Soviet Union, deemed the eighth wonder of the world. Taken to Konigsberg, it vanished by war's end, sparking a decades-long hunt.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: The Honjo Masamune, Japan's greatest sword, vanished after WWII. Taken as a souvenir by a US Sergeant, it's now a legendary lost artifact sought by collectors worldwide.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1935, Otto Rahn, a German writer, was tasked by Heinrich Himmler to find the Holy Grail. Himmler, despite his Nazi beliefs, envisioned displaying it in his castle, Wewelsberg, as his Camelot.

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Murder Maps

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tent City
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Dead of Night
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: The Million Dollar Man Pt. 1
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Aloha, Robertsons!
programme.desc: After all their hard work, Willie decides to take the entire Robertson clan on a family vacation to Hawaii. But Willie's daily itinerary for the trip gets constantly undermined by the family's desire to participate in their own island activities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Till Duck Do Us Part
programme.desc: Everyone comes together to plan a surprise wedding for Phil and Kay, setting up a special ceremony on their land, which the whole family attends. Si distracts Phil and Kay by taking them on a "trip down memory lane".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: So You Think You Can Date?
programme.desc: After discovering that Martin has to miss a Friday night poker game for a date, the guys (as well as their wives) take turns figuring out the best way to coach him for romance. When babysitting for Jep and Jessica turns into a rocky road.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Hot Tub Grime Machine
programme.desc: The guys realize that Godwin has never really asked them for a favor, even though they are all always helping each other out. Godwin asks them to help him get a hot tub, so they set out to help him pick one up.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A-Jase-ent Living
programme.desc: Due to construction at Jase and Missy's house, Willie and Korie invite Jase and the kids to live with them while Missy is out of town visiting friends. Then, what begins in the duck call room as a series of "Gentlemen's Bets".

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Termite Be a Problem
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from - Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: John Luke After Dentist
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process - including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Scoot Along Si

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Jerky Boys
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Devil and Jonathan Smith
programme.desc: Mark has been tricked into selling his soul in order to save a little girl's life. But the Devil has another agenda: acquiring Jonathan's soul.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Popcorn, Peanuts and Crackerjacks
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Smile in the Third Row
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Secret
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Secrets Of The Ice Arsenal
programme.desc: An unidentified metal object is found on Kiska Island. A centuries-old gold mining mystery is investigated. In Siberia, a network of ice tunnels is explored. Fossils unearthed in the Canadian Arctic lead to the discovery of a new species of camel.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Mummy Cabin
programme.desc: The remains of an ancient log cabin buried in permafrost are examined. High in the Arctic, a huge metal tower stands alone on the desolate landscape. An odd looking wooden idol is found. Strange sounds are heard emanating from the northern lights.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Revenge Of The Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Canadian divers spot an object that may solve a Cold War nuclear mystery. A mummified businessman is found atop Mexico’s highest peak. In Iceland, a cave said to be home to a fire giant is investigated. Mummified penguins are found in Antarctica.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of The Arctic Shipwreck
programme.desc: A Russian mystery involving the deaths of nine hikers may finally be solved. A legendary ship is pulled from icy Arctic waters. In Antarctica, a melting glacier could cause a global disaster. Russian researchers find a strange arrangement of bones.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Glacier Mummy
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a U.S. Army soldier. In Alaska, strange bundles of canvas and wood high up on a mountain are discovered. Volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital WWII weather station is uncovered.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Ring
programme.desc: A stranger greets little Danny by name; worried, Claudia moves the family into the mansion; Peter DeVilbis' architect hints at the playboy's drug problem; Kirby's hand swells uncontrollably.

programme.title: Dynasty: Lancelot

programme.title: Dynasty: Seizure

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Girl

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident

programme.desc: Chanelle is the light Michael needed in his life, but out of the blue she's disappeared, leaving only Nev and Max to help him find his missing love. (S5, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Mama doesn't always know best. Shuntay enlists the help of Nev and Max after her mum begins talking about marriage and uprooting her family to be with a man who refuses to meet in person. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Great Depression
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Deliveries and Deadlines
programme.desc: New year; new beginnings. Pauly is dusting off the turntables and finally headed back out on tour. Deena's Baby Meatball #2 is almost here, and Mike is ready to officially become "Big Daddy Sitch." But nothing could prepare him for what happens next.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Snooki vs. The Rock
programme.desc: No longer pregnant, Deena has a meatball day with Snooki. Meanwhile, Vinny is no longer bi-coastal, Angelina is fed up, and Mike is struggling as he awaits the moment he can bring Baby Romeo home from the hospital.

programme.title: Celebrity Ex on the Beach: Celeb Surprises
programme.desc: Eight hot, love hungry, celebs meet in their new villa for the first time. Kori see's a familiar face while Mike takes his celeb crush on a date. But, there's one more surprise in store! (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Orpheus
programme.desc: Jim Phelps assumes a risky pose as a drug addict with information to sell to get behind the Iron Curtain where he seeks to stop an unknown assassin from killing an unknown victim on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Crane
programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Death Squad
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Choice
programme.desc: Paris is marked for execution when he impersonates a power-mad mystic trying to win control of a friendly country by hypnotizing its woman ruler on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Martyr
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Caught In The Middle
programme.desc: Leah tells Jeremy about her confusion with Corey, Chelsea tries to get back on track with school. Things fall apart with Jenelle because she moved in quickly with Josh. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler have an emotional goodbye as she heads to a treatment facility for her anxiety and depression. Maci and Taylor buy a bigger house to fit their growing needs.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci and Taylor question their decision to have their wedding so soon, while Farrah and Simon get some relationship advice from Dr. Jenn. Catelynn is homesick so Tyler and Nova visit her at her treatment facility.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci and Taylor welcome their third child but still worry that Ryan isn't showing up enough for Bentley. Gary tries to co-parent with Amber but realizes there's still tension between them. Farrah decides she's ready to move on from Simon.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci and Taylor welcome their third child but still worry that Ryan isn't showing up enough for Bentley. Gary tries to co-parent with Amber but realizes there's still tension between them. Farrah decides she's ready to move on from Simon.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber worries she's developed a new addiction to food and consults a doctor about her weight. Farrah decides to open a frozen yogurt shop, while Tyler's concerned that Catelynn is falling back into her old, bad habits.

programme.title: Resistance: They Fought Back!
programme.desc: Resistance – They Fought Back provides corrects this myth of Jewish passivity, powerfully illustrating the uprising in ghettos large and small, rebellions in death camps, and armed resistance in the forests.

programme.title: Hitler & Churchill: The Eagle & The Lion
programme.desc: The Old Lion vs. the German Eagle. This clash of titans waged at the highest level of power dominated the last century. And leads us to posit a chilling contingency to history: what would Europe be now had the players been different?

programme.title: Hitler & Churchill: The Eagle & The Lion
programme.desc: In the 1930’s, Hitler is at his apex; while in England the aristocratic Churchill has lost the election and hit bottom.Seen as politically washed up, the old deputy is nonetheless the only person who relentlessly denounces Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Architects Of Darkness: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler: The film explores the roots of Adolf Hitler and traces the story of his life from the town of his birth to his final days.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Sharks and Recreation
programme.desc: With only three weeks left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the pressure begins to take a toll on the captains.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Mighty Bite
programme.desc: With only two weeks left in the fishing season and the price of blue fin tuna on the rise, the Gloucester captains race to bring in record hauls.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Reckoning
programme.desc: There is only one week of fishing left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season and the Gloucester fleet is set for a final showdown in a bid to catch the last monster tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Head To Tail (Special)
programme.desc: It's a look back at the best moments from two seasons of Wicked Tuna, featuring the wildest catches and fiercest rivalries, plus a sneak peek at the upcoming third season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: First Blood
programme.desc: It's the first day of the new Bluefin tuna fishing season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and every captain in the fleet wants to the land the coveted first tuna of the year.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Wolf Creek
programme.desc: Wardens patrol the Wolf Creek area of Montana for illegal hunting activity. Elsewhere, Wardens conduct a mule deer decoy operation.

programme.title: Vinnie Jones Toughest Cops: Best Of
programme.desc: We show the best of the action from the series, taking in the highlights from Colombia, South Africa, Papua New Guinea, El Salvador, Brazil, Kosovo and Jamaica.

programme.title: Vinne Jones USA Toughest Cops: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Vinnie Jones rides with the LAPD Gang units in the notorious district of South Central LA. He goes from the hills to the hood as he experiences the dark side of LA and discovers just why it's so renowned for murder, drugs and gang related crime.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Naples
programme.desc: Naples, the birthplace of pizza has a rich and vibrant past but these same streets are home to the richest and most dangerous criminal organisation in the world. MacIntyre heads to Naples to find out why it has become the murder capital of Europe.

programme.title: Macintyre: Worlds toughest Towns: Dublin
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland. Home to Oscar Wilde, James Joyce, Boyzone and Donal MacIntyre. But unbeknown to most tourists beyond the bustling bars of Temple Street the city is in the middle of a drug fuelled gang war.

programme.title: Danny Dyer's Deadliest Men: Stephen French
programme.desc: Danny Dyer meets Stephen French, a former gangster from Liverpool who built a notorious reputation as a ‘taxman’ by robbing drug dealers in the 80s and 90s.

programme.title: Ancient Alien Question
programme.desc: Join Philip Coppens, star of the History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series, as he provides proof that UFO's helmed by Extraterrestrials from other worlds came to Earth millennia ago.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Cover Ups Conspiracy : The Chinese Spy Baloon
programme.desc: Objects shot down in US/Canada airspace. Pentagon feigns ignorance. Alien involvement?

programme.title: Project Serpo
programme.desc: 2005: Ex-agent unveils 3,000-page report on a secret ET exchange mission to planet Serpo

programme.title: The Hidden Hand Alien Contact and the Government Cover Up
programme.desc: The Hidden Hand is a controversial EBE Award winning documentary that explores the possibility of an extraterrestrial presence here on Earth.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 4
programme.desc: The team help Georgie, who had such a wild time with the boys on holiday she commemorated the trip with a tattoo that's left her single ever since. Alice takes on Kelly's animation-inspired disaster.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch meets Gaz, who has his best friend's initials in an intimate place, and the whole team are shocked by the cover-up he wants. Jay gives Lady Gaga superfan Harry the portrait of his dreams.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Drag queen Devon feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo because it's a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, whose portrait of her daughter is more than a little spooky.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 10
programme.desc: Alice rids Sammie of an unladylike error, and Sketch erases Lloyd's misunderstood etching.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 9
programme.desc: Alice paints over Francesca's pitiful Picasso. Sketch gives Madison a memorial to her mum.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 11
programme.desc: Alice gets her claws into dog-lover William's cover when he betrays his furry friends in ink. Emma disguises her tattooed equations after attempts to impress her maths teacher didn't add up.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Shake Ups and Break Ups!
programme.desc: Chloe and Sam have split and the squad are worried how it's going to impact the family. James and Abbie return but their first night out ends in disaster when Beau tells Bethan it's over! (S20, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Give It Another Go!
programme.desc: Sam realises he has to sit down with Chloe so they leave the house for an honest chat. They decide to give things another go but the news doesn't go down well with the rest of the house! (S20, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Tensions Keep Rising
programme.desc: Chloe confronts the girls about not supporting her. Sam's behaviour on a lads night out leads to them splitting up, again! Abbie tells James she saw Chloe get with a lad in Ibiza. (S20, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Party in Portugal
programme.desc: Sam makes a big decision when the squad are told they're off to Portugal. The family live their best lives on the Algarve, but tension between Bethan, Beau and Abbie threatens to boil over. (S20, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Agg on the Algarve
programme.desc: Bethan and Abbie's row impacts on the house, and it all kicks off when Nat calls Bethan and Beau's relationship 'toxic'. The Geordie's get stuck into the Sangria and tear up the strip! (S20, ep5)

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Coast of the Whalesharks
programme.desc: On the remote coastline of Australia’s northwest, there are great natural wonders to be found. Above the sea on this sunbaked coast, there is very little; only a sparse landscape shaped by the arid conditions. But here, the miracle reveals itself…

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Falkland Islands: Penguin Paradise
programme.desc: The Falkland's bleak, battered, and windswept archipelago lies 460 km from the South American mainland. Rugged mountains and expansive pristine coastline are a unique home for wildlife  especially for one of the world's most iconic flightless birds.

programme.title: Wildest Africa: Ngorongoro: Born of Fire
programme.desc: Ngorongoro is thought to have formed about 2.5 million years ago from a large volcano, whose cone collapsed inward after a major eruption. This fertile land is full of wildlife, from cunning hyena and proud lions to vast herds of wildebeest and elephants.

programme.title: Australia's Wild Places: The Rainforest
programme.desc: Daintree National Park is a magical meeting of rainforest and reef, lying at the heart of the world heritage listed wet tropics of Queensland.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Zanzibar: Land of Giants
programme.desc: The Zanzibar Archipelago has been labeled the most exotic island chain in the world. Pristine sands and azure blue sea make it a much loved holiday destination. /The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. Each of the 7,000 islands are unique.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Last Days / Knock on Wood
programme.desc: McGee tries to save Camp Lakebottom from being overtaken by the Grim Camper.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Who's Ghouling Who? / The Adominable Dr. Squatch
programme.desc: McGee accidentally summons Percy, a ghost with a very 'fiery' personality.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Marshmallow Madness / 28 Suzi's Later
programme.desc: Armand goes into a feeding frenzy when wild marshmallows give the campers a rash.

programme.desc: The kids ignore Rosebuds warning and summon Bloody Marty from the ominous mirror world.

programme.desc: McGee signs a contract with Sheba the bandshee.

programme.desc: The campers summon Armand's old rival, Doofus the clown who vows to destroy the campers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A New Threat: Part I
programme.desc: A mysterious new threat arrives on the scene in New Domino City, forcing Yusei to take to the streets and track down a rogue Turbo Duelist known as The Ghost.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei must figure out a way to take down Ghost's Meklord Emperor Wisel before Wisel's special ability throws his game and his runner into a tailspin.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Lessons Learned
programme.desc: When Vice Chancellor Rudolph Heitmann threatens to expel all the members of Leo and Luna's class from Duel Academy, Yusei attempts to teach the teacher a valuable lesson by challenging the Vice Chancellor to a duel to keep his friends in school.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Trash Talk
programme.desc: When Crow is asked to convince an old friend of Martha's to move into her retirement home, Crow decides to tackle the task by challenging the old man to a trash-talking junkyard duel. Can Crow convince the old man to relocate?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: A Duel with Interest
programme.desc: When a loan shark starts sinking his teeth into New Domino City, Jack decides to reel in this money-grubbing menace for good by putting his most prized possessions on the line in a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Wicked Spirits
programme.desc: When Leo and Luna decide to go exploring a nearby forest rumored to be haunted by wicked spirits, they soon discover that the rumors are all too real when a mysterious boy traps Luna in his house and challenges Leo to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part I
programme.desc: Yusei wakes up to find himself trapped in the back of a big rig with a bump on his head and no way out. After a mysterious tip leads Akiza to Yusei's location, the two friends soon find themselves Turbo Dueling an unfamiliar foe.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: French Twist: Part II
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Sherry races on, Sherry reveals some shocking secrets about the upcoming World Racing Grand Prix. Meanwhile, Akiza begins to gain a new understanding and appreciation for Turbo Dueling while riding shotgun to Yusei.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: Synchro Straits

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's: The Synchro Solution
programme.desc: A mysterious duelist named Vizor offers to show Yusei a new dueling strategy known as The Synchro Solution.

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Danger Mouse

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: Flippity Francine/Muffy Takes the Wheel
programme.desc: When Muffy posts a goofy video of Francine on the Muffington Post, Francine worries she will become the laughing stock of the entire school. And it's the 1st Annual Lakewood Derby and Muffy's revved up!

programme.title: Arthur: Molina's Mulligan/Buster Bombs
programme.desc: Alberto discovers he has a natural talent for golf and begins to compete, but will his dad's embarrassing cheers make him give it up? Buster has lost his flair for funny, and the harder he tries to make people laugh, the worse it gets.

programme.title: Arthur: Meek For A Week/Arthur, World's Greatest Gleeper
programme.desc: Muffy bets Francine she can't be nice to everyone for a whole week--and soon wishes she hadn't. Next, Arthur didn't mean to tell a lie, he just got stuck in a sort of fib, because he thought it was cool to be a Gleeper.

programme.title: Arthur: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets
programme.desc: When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Horns George/Bleep
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: Math, schmath. That's what Sue Ellen thinks… until she runs into a problem her artistic vision can't solve. Sue Ellen can't wait to meet her pen pal in person.

programme.title: Arthur: What Is That Thing?/Buster's Best Behavior
programme.desc: Arthur and friends are all faced with seemingly impossible tasks, from fixing a model biplane to babysitting D.W. And, Buster knows he's fun, but he's beginning to feel like he's not particularly good at anything.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Rabbits - Listen
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective. But all great detectives need a mystery to solve! One quickly comes his way when an animal nibbles on one of Baby Bop's healthy snacks.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Play Piano With Me!
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Seeing - Beethoven's Hear!
programme.desc: An ordinary game of "hide and seek" takes a not-so-ordinary turn when Baby Bop claims that an elephant is hiding in the park! Barney and Riff are happy to play along, but BJ thinks that his sister may be "seeing things."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Little Red Rock'n Hood - Differences
programme.desc: Baby Bop is having a hard time finding a story she hasn't heard before. Barney and the little dinos decide to tell her an old story with a new twist! They tell the story of "Little Red Riding Hood" in a whole new way...by singing it!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isn’t satisfied with the things she can do. When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Farewell Inferno
programme.desc: Inferno uses his Decepticon “half” to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Crash Course
programme.desc: The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Omega Supreme
programme.desc: Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: A Heroic Battle
programme.desc: Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: The Power
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Optimus Supreme
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Unicron Perishes
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Ambition
programme.desc: The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Wishes
programme.desc: Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Galvatron!
programme.desc: Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's “soul” is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon: Break Through
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to break through the energon grid and then later have to go underground

programme.title: Property Brothers: Shannon & Darl
programme.desc: After years of hard-core studying and dorm-size apartments, nurse Shannon and doctor Darl are ready for their real estate graduation. And since they’re now expecting their first child, they’ve got mere months to get out.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nancy & Dave
programme.desc: Tired of crashing on her best friend’s couch, biker chick bombshell Nancy is hoping to score a suburban pad of her own, complete with a feminine-industrial flair that reflects her personality, and a two-car chick-cave.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Samantha & Yaron
programme.desc: Samantha and Yaron recently orchestrated their dream wedding, and now they’re on the hunt for an urban dream home to match. For the moment, the couple’s compact downtown condo is cramping their style.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Christine & Thomas
programme.desc: With a baby on the way, Christine and Thomas are ready to settle down. Thomas has promised to find Christine her downtown dream home before their baby arrives. But until he does, they’re crashing at a friend’s place.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Chase & Jessica
programme.desc: New parents Chase and Jessica are all about family, but after crashing at Grandma’s place for the past four months, they’re eager to find a city dream home where they can put down roots and entertain in style.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tyler & Lindsay
programme.desc: Tyler and Lindsay love their waterfront lifestyle, but their tiny condo is giving them the squeeze. They desperately need a family home where they can put down roots, but finding a property requires compromises.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Mondo Gecko
programme.desc: Michelangelo is turtle-napped by mutant lizard Mondo Gecko, who was mutated at the same time and place as the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Mutagen Man
programme.desc: Krang plans to use a large rocket's vapour trail to rain mutagen over the city when nerdy delivery boy Seymour Guts falls into Shredder's mutagen vat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Badd Time
programme.desc: Hillybilly crooks Bedelia Badd and sons Bufrod and Bubbaheist the Turtles new improved van, using it to steal the diamond in Dr. Kepple's Powercizer, which drains the city's power and could destroy it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo Meets Bugman - Again!
programme.desc: The Swatter threatens to destroy the city with a stolen swarm of super termites unless the Turtles meet him atop The Entire State Building.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Muckman Messes Up!
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder, Rocksteady and Bebop after new mutagen Compound X-7, which Krang thinks will un-mutate Turtles. At lab, garbagemen are doused with the stuff and change into mutants Muckman and Joe Eyeball, blaming Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Napoleon Bullfrog: Colossus of the Swamps
programme.desc: Krang uses Big Louie to steal anti-freeze to try to start the Technodrome, now stuck in the Arctic. Shredder zaps Turtle pal Napoleon Bullfrog, with mutagen, who mutates into a giant monster and escapes into the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Raphael vs. The Volcano
programme.desc: Raphael, convinced he is dying due to a faulty reading by Donatell's Health-O-Meter, becomes do-gooder THE Green Defender, popping up around the city foiling crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Donatello's Duplicate
programme.desc: Donatello creates an egotistical Clone of himself who stuffs Donatello in a trunk.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Ice Creature Cometh
programme.desc: Bebop dumps a vat of mutagen into the Arctic ice, creating a gigantic Ice Monster, who Krang unleashes on the city to help him steal thermal nuclear devices to free the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leonardo Cuts Loose
programme.desc: Muscleman fiend Wally Airhead captures Turtles with a runaway exercise machine trap to add their powers to his race of super musclemen, but Turtles escape.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy and his dad play basketball. The Tubbies are very careful not to drop their Tubby Toast, but when Tinky Winky has an accident, the Noo Noo tidies up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Andy Brown and Amber look for some ladybirds. Tinky Winky, Dipsy & Laa-Laa decide to go high up. Tinky Winky walks to the top of the path.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Fothergill has a nasty case of dry rot, so Bob and crew will have to use some smelly chemicals to fix it. As these will affect Mr Fothergill’s allergies, he goes to his sister’s for the day. But she doesn’t get on with Hamish, his pet parrot.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: After a stormy night, Wendy has to mend a chimney pot at Mrs Potts’, while Bob repairs a drainage pipe for Farmer Pickles. A wire fence has been blown away at the farm too, but fixing the pipe takes priority.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Today’s the day that the machines get to build their brand new shelter. It’s going to be built into the side of a hill and made using found materials. Lofty, who slept outside at the old yard, decides that he’d like a place in the new shelter.

programme.title: When Bob Became a Builder
programme.desc: It’s a beautiful day in Sunflower Valley and Bob and his machine team are building a new picnic area at the beach. Dizzy, Lofty and Scrambler are clearing stuff that’s been washed up on the beach, while Benny has a great time digging with Scoop and Muck.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: An observation tower is going to be added next to the Visitor’s centre to provide a scenic view of Sunflower Valley. The scaffolding is raised and Roley prepares a path to connect the tower to the Dome.

programme.title: Mega Machines: The Movie
programme.desc: Scoop, Muck and Lofty can’t wait to help Bob with his biggest build ever – building a dam and transforming an old quarry into a reservoir to provide Spring City with fresh water.

programme.title: Skyscrapers and Car Parks
programme.desc: Join Bob on his next visit On Site! Follow Bob and the team as they take us through the construction of skyscrapers & car parks. Learn how skyscrapers are built up high on strong foundations and see how lifts are needed to carry people to the top.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr Ellis has a batch of Doves delivered, to use in his magic act, and asks Bob to build a dovecote for his new birds to live in. Mr Ellis realises that he has to go to work but does not want to leave the birds at home alone.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a new swimming pool for the Mayor. He asks Muck to collect some special tiles from JJ, explaining that they are very fragile and easy to break.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob is building a water feature in Mrs Potts’ garden, while Wendy and Scoop are demolishing a dry stone wall. Bob and the Machines are greatly amused by the statue Mrs Potts has chosen for her centrepiece.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Now that Robert has taken over at the old yard, Wendy can finally move to Sunflower Valley! Bob is still in Bobsville, while the machines are in charge of setting up Wendy’s caravan, complete with solar panels, as a special surprise.

programme.title: Credentialed - TOUR Championship
programme.desc: Credentialed - TOUR Championship takes you inside the ropes of the 2025 season finale with an all-access pass at East Lake Golf Club, where the top 30 players are all vying to take home the PGA TOUR's ultimate prize, the FedExCup.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Frances Barber and Phil Davis join Catherine Southon and Thomas Plant on a buying spree around East Sussex. Armed with £400 and a classic car, they hear a gripping tale of eccentricity and attempted murder on the way to auction in London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Former MP and health minister Edwina Currie goes up against journalist Eve Pollard on a trip around Liverpool and Manchester. Paired with Paul Laidlaw and David Harper, Edwina goes underground and Eve sees a different side to woman's lib.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's Weatherfield versus Walford, as Shaun Williamson takes on Vicky Entwistle. In a stunning TVR Chimera, with Paul Laidlaw and Mark Stacy, they're looking to see who can turn the biggest profit at auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Globe-trotting Judith Chalmers takes on son Mark Durden-Smith. With a couple of guides--Paul Laidlaw and James Lewis--they visit Worcestershire and Gloucestershire, sorting the tourist tat from treasure in their racy 1970s TR6.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mick Hughes
programme.desc: Landlord and pub owner Mick Hughes is brutally attacked in his living quarters situated above his bar, he bleeds to death. Discovered by employees 48 hours later, the police start gathering evidence.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Darryl Cozart
programme.desc: Family man Darryl Cozart disappears one night after work. His wife is frantic she knows something is wrong. The police believe it’s a missing persons case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs
programme.desc: A dedicated psychic puts his reputation on the line to track down two con men in Scotland.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A serial killer is loose in Baton Rouge, police believe they’re looking for a youngish white man driving a white pick up truck.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jacqueline Poole
programme.desc: Twenty-five year old Jacqueline Poole is assaulted and strangled in her home. The police find her body 48 hours later and launch their investigation.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lawrence Mbroh
programme.desc: Lawrence Mbroh was in a dangerous business - he sold drugs. So when he disappears, his father Alfred is worried. Detective Pam Gray is investigating the case but can find no new leads.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Rosa Talamantes
programme.desc: Can a psychic lead police to a body so they can convict a cold-blooded killer? Rosa Talamantes goes out for a drink with her boyfriend and never returns.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Girl in The Ditch
programme.desc: When 12 year old Agnes Ali'iva'a drowned in a ditch in 1992, the police initially thought her death was accidental. It was four years before public and political pressure forced police to re-investigate her death.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Where's Grandad?
programme.desc: 65-year-old Alan Gordon Woodford of Bedford St. Mossburn left his home on foot Saturday morning April 20, 1985 and was never seen or heard of again.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: In Too Deep
programme.desc: In 1999, Kiwi engineer Aaron Hopa and his English colleague Robert Glazzard were murdered on board a survey ship in the Persian Gulf in.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.desc: Despite mysterious and unnerving warnings from locals, the Ghost Hunters face their fears and stay on mission: to help people confront terrifying paranormal encounters that have shaken them to their core.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Anniversary
programme.desc: Ever since a close-knit Kentucky family moved into their new home, they've been visited by the spirit of a young girl.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Boy Pushed Me
programme.desc: Bruce and Danielle are terrified by an EVP recorded in their Indiana home stating "Kill them." Even more chilling, their toddler son survived a fall out of a window only to tell his parents, "Boy pushed me."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Sickness
programme.desc: Something is making Lisa and her family sick. Is it natural or paranormal? Ryan and the team uncover the tragic history surrounding Lisa's home--with shocking connections to respiratory illness.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Family Ties
programme.desc: Jimmie is haunted by the apparition of a mysterious old woman who peers at him in the bathroom of his family's Petersburg, VA home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Bedroom Eyes
programme.desc: PRS travels to rural Pennsylvania to investigate a haunting that began after a new couple moved into an old family farm.?Over the next three days, hidden tragedies are uncovered and latent psychic abilities are revealed.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the outbuildings of this large estate, where many people have witnessed strange occurrences, some he is about to witness first-hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Pen-Y-Lan House P2
programme.desc: Stuart investigates the main house alone, although it isn’t long before he feels something is there with him.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Bishton Hall
programme.desc: Yvette takes Glen and Mary into the incredibly haunted Bishton Hall. They start in the upper floors and work their way down to the cellars, but is something following them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P1
programme.desc: Karl investigates the ground floor back rooms of this landmark castle alone, but soon realises that something is lurking in the shadows.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Margam Castle P2
programme.desc: The upper floors of Margam Castle are said to be haunted by many different spirits, Stuart goes it alone to try and find them.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P1
programme.desc: Said to be the Most Haunted prison in the UK, HMP Dorchester is a scary place to be with a group of people but alone it becomes terrifying. Karl investigates the upper cells and gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen: Dorchester Prison 2 P2
programme.desc: Stuart enters the underbelly of this remarkable building and starts to witness some very strange occurrences.
